UltraGrid 1.10.3 (tags/v1.10.3 rev 12e2705 built Feb 20 2026 15:07:39)

OpenGL renderer: Apple M1 Max 2.1 Metal - 89.4 (GLSL: 1.20)
Usage:
	-t syphon[:name=<name>|:app=<appname>|:override_fps|:RGB] | -t syphon:[full]help
where
	      <name> - Syphon server name
	   <appname> - Syphon server application name
	override_fps - overrides FPS in metadata (but not the actual rate captured)
	         RGB - use RGB as an output codec instead of default UYVY

Available servers:
	1) app: Simple Server name: 

Exit
